revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Confusing%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{for |a template that places the hatnote "Not to be confused with…" on pages whose title may be confusing |Template:Distinguish}} {{Redirect|Template:Unclear||Template:Clarify}} {{Redirect|Template:Incomprehensible|the inline cleanup tag|Template:Incomprehensible inline}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Usage == * This template categorises tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]]. * You can specify whether the template applies to an article (default) or section by adding |article or |section after the template's name. There is also the [[:en:Template:Confusing section|Template:Confusing section]] template for the sections. * It is recommended to use the reason parameter to explain what is confusing. For example: :{{Tlx|Confusing|2=date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|3=reason=the Wangler is referred to in the plural but the diagram shows only one}} {{Confusing|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|reason=the Wangler is referred to in the plural but the diagram shows only one}} *When a talk page discussion is held, a direct link to that discussion can be added via the {{para|talk}} parameter. For example: :{{Tlx|Confusing|2=date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|3=talk=Template talk:Confusing#Talk parameter please!}} {{Confusing|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|talk=Template talk:Confusing#Talk parameter please!}} *Do not capitalize the beginning of the reason, since it is preceded by "In particular, ". *Do not add a full stop/period at the end of the reason because the template automatically puts a full stop/period in. * Please do not [[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst:]] this template. {{Tlx|Confusing|small{{=}}left}} generates: {{Confusing|small=left}} {{Tlx|Confusing|small{{=}}left|reason{{=}}the tensing of the article is ambiguous}} generates: {{Confusing|small=left|reason=the tensing of the article is ambiguous}} ==Template data== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "This template is used to mark an article or section as confusing and in need of clarification.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Article or section?", "type": "string", "description": "Set to 'section' to specify that you are referring to the section", "default": "article" }, "talk": { "label": "Discussion location", "description": "The location at which the discussion on the issue is being held. Should be full page name, followed by #, followed by section name. Please do not enclose between [[and ]]. The link will be automatically formatted using the section sign (§).", "example": "Template talk:Confusing#Talk parameter please!", "type": "wiki-page-name", "suggested": true }, "reason": { "label": "What is confusing?", "type": "string", "description": "Explain what part of the text needs to be clarified." }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "The date this template was added, in the format [full month name] [full year].", "example": "January 2015", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true }, "small": { "type": "string", "description": "Set to 'left' if a small version should be shown instead of the default", "label": "Small?" } }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "talk", "reason", "date", "small" ], "format": "inline" } ==See also== * [[Template:Clarify]], an in-line version of this template * [[:en:Template:Confusing section|Template:Confusing section]], a section version of this template * [[Template:Technical]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Vague]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] for an overview of cleanup templates. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
